title: matricaria inodora var. maritima
intro: Matricaria inodora var. maritima, also known as sea chamomile, is a subspecies of the chamomile plant family that is native to coastal areas. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of Matricaria inodora var. maritima include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Matricaria inodora var. maritima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
